description: Create a new commercial building model and install a façade-mounted solar array. 1. Set the geographic location to Denver, Colorado (latitude ~39.74 N, longitude ~104.99 W). 2. Draw a rectangular 4-story commercial building (approx 20m wide x 12m deep x 14m tall) with a flat roof. 3. Select the south-facing vertical wall (the large 20m x 14m façade). 4. Using the Skelion plugin, configure the solar panel dimensions to 0.992m width and 1.650m height. 5. Insert the solar panels onto this south-facing vertical wall in a grid arrangement (at least 3 columns and 4 rows). 6. Save the completed model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\facade_solar.skp'.
